title: Parent — Grades & Assignments
content:
Overview


The Grades and Assignments pages let parents monitor their children's academic performance and workload. Both pages use child sub-tabs so parents with multiple children can switch between them easily.



Grades Page


The Grades page displays grades for each child organized by term and year. Key features:


  • Child sub-tabs: Select which child's grades to view — each child has their own tab
  • Term selector: Choose the academic term (Fall Semester, Spring Semester, Winter Semester, September Term, January Term, May Term)
  • Year selector: Use plus/minus buttons to change the academic year

Once a child, term, and year are selected, a table displays:


  • Subject: Each subject the child is enrolled in for that term
  • Grades: Scores for classwork, midterms, finals, and assignments as entered by the teacher
  • Teacher comments: A comment icon appears where the teacher has left feedback

Viewing Teacher Comments:


  1. Click the comment icon next to a grade
  2. A modal opens showing the subject, teacher name, and the full comment text
  3. Click Close to dismiss

Grades are read-only for parents. If a parent believes a grade is incorrect, they should contact the teacher or school admin directly.



Assignments Page


The Assignments page shows all assignments that teachers have sent to the selected child. Key features:


  • Child sub-tabs: Select which child's assignments to view
  • Term and Year selectors: Filter assignments by academic period
  • Subject filter: Dropdown to filter by a specific subject or view all

Each assignment displays:


  • Title: The assignment name
  • Subject: Which subject it belongs to
  • Teacher: The teacher who sent it
  • Description: Full instructions from the teacher
  • Date sent: When the assignment was issued

A count shows how many assignments match the current filters. Assignments are read-only — parents can view them but cannot submit work on behalf of their child.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Use the sub-tabs at the top to switch between your children — each child's grades and assignments are separate."
  • "Make sure you've selected the right term and year to see the correct grades."
  • "Click the comment icon next to any grade to read the teacher's feedback."
  • "Assignments show you what your child should be working on — you can filter by subject to focus on one class."
  • "If you think a grade is incorrect, contact the teacher or school admin. Grades cannot be changed from the Parent Portal."
